description_long: This is a wooden storage box with a square shape and reinforced edges, resembling a classic crate. The exterior is constructed from vertical wooden planks, with visible grain and a slightly weathered texture, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. Each visible side features a large white star encircled by a red ring, painted in a slightly distressed style, suggesting it may be used for military or industrial purposes. The top of the box is flat and also displays the star emblem, making it easily identifiable from above. The box appears solid and sturdy, suitable for stacking or storing heavy items. There are no visible handles, locks, or hinges, and the lid seems to be a simple removable flat top.
description: A rugged wooden storage crate with a painted white star in a red circle on each side and a flat, reinforced top. The box has a weathered, utilitarian look and is likely used for industrial or military storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden planks, reinforced edges, and a large white star in a red circle centered on the side.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the same star emblem and plank construction visible.
description_view_2: Another side view, again showing the star emblem and the flat, plank-reinforced surface.
description_view_3: Rear view, visually similar to the other sides, with the star emblem and no visible handles or locks.
